allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; print\('PIL:', Image.__version__\)")
Bash(python -c "from svglib.svglib import svg2rlg; print\('svglib ok'\)")
Bash(python -c "from svglib.svglib import svg2rlg; from reportlab.graphics import renderPM; print\('ok'\)")
Bash(rm -f pointer_b64.txt /tmp/pointer_b64.txt 2>/dev/null; bundle exec jekyll build 2>&1 | tail -4 && ls assets/img/ | grep -i pointer)
Bash(ls -lat assets/img/ 2>&1 | head -8 && echo "---Downloads---" && ls -lat ~/Downloads/ 2>/dev/null | head -5)

PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -match '^\(192\\.168|10\\.|172\\.\(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[0-1]\)\)\\.' -and $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch 'Loopback|vEthernet|WSL' } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($result = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 4000 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "localhost:4000 reachable: $result"; Write-Output "---"; netstat -an | Select-String ":4000" | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell(Get-NetFirewallProfile | Select-Object Name, Enabled | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---existing rules for port 4000 or ruby---"; Get-NetFirewallRule -Enabled True -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match 'ruby|jekyll|4000' } | Select-Object DisplayName, Direction, Action | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-NetFirewallRule -Enabled True | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match 'ruby' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.DisplayName\) | Profile: $\($_.Profile\) | Action: $\($_.Action\) | Direction: $\($_.Direction\)" }; Write-Output "---current Wi-Fi 2 connection profile---"; Get-NetConnectionProfile -InterfaceAlias 'Wi-Fi 2' | Select-Object Name, NetworkCategory, IPv4Connectivity | Format-List)

PowerShell($lanResult = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 192.168.1.159 -Port 4000 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Can THIS PC reach 192.168.1.159:4000 \(its own LAN IP\)? $lanResult")
